title: Create and Switch in One Step

content.problemStatement:
Is it possible to use a **single command to create a new branch** and **switch** to it —
instead of running two commands like this?
```sss
git branch feature-branch
git switch feature-branch
```
**Yes, absolutely!**

**Git gives you a shortcut for this:**
```sss
git switch -c feature-branch
```
The `-c` stands for create here.

- This single command **creates a new branch named `feature-branch`** 
- **Switches to it immediately**, so you can start working right away. 


---

**Note :** \
In earlier versions of Git before `git switch` was introduced. - 
```sss
git checkout -b 
```

This older command does the same job as **`git switch -c`**, but it was used.
